# platformReadFunctionGraph

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the platformReadFunctionGraph query

## Usage

```typescript
db.query.platformReadFunctionGraph({ graphId: '<UUID>' }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run platformReadFunctionGraph

```typescript
const result = await db.query.platformReadFunctionGraph({ graphId: '<UUID>' }).execute();
```
